provenance: Pooled mean of 3 honest on-box runs of origin/main @ b584657 on dc1tg01's live LiteLLM gateway (read-only, mutation OFF), via the on-box A/B harness (eval/run-on-box.sh), N=20 corpus each (N=60 pooled). Real Runner + shared core/judge. Measured during this session's R2 gate (not a dedicated run for this baseline). Individual-run overalls: 3.09, 3.23, 2.91. Re-measure with `TG_EVAL_RUNS=3 make eval-gate` and re-pool on a legitimate upward move; never lower it to hide a regression.
